monospace.usage: Financial tickers, tags, meta info, code blocks

financial_ticker.description: Continuous fast-marquee at the very top displaying BIST/Wall Street stock prices with TF AL (Green) and TF SAT (Red) indicators.
financial_ticker.styles: bg-[#050505] text-xs font-jetbrains py-2 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center gap-8

navbar.styles: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 py-4

hero_article.styles: col-span-full lg:col-span-8 relative min-h-[60vh] border border-white/10 group overflow-hidden

sidebar_trending.description: Right side column showing trending/latest articles.

article_card.styles: flex flex-col border border-white/10 bg-[#121212] group hover:border-white/30 transition-colors

admin_dashboard.styles: Strict control room grid, Shadcn UI customized to dark theme with 0px radius.

hero_featured.description: stock market candlestick chart on dark screen

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI.
Enforce a strict DARK MODE only. The aesthetic is a high-contrast financial quant terminal (PrivyAlgo).
DO NOT USE PURPLE OR TEAL colors. Stick to Obsidian Black background, with bright Green (#10B981) and Red (#EF4444) for accents.
Implement the Magazine/Blog layout: Ticker -> Nav -> Hero Article -> 3-col Grid / Sidebar.
Add a scrolling marquee ticker at the top using 'react-fast-marquee' showing mock financial data like 'BIST THYAO +2.45% TF AL'.
All navigation and text should be in Turkish.
For the admin panel, implement layout for managing articles, using a WYSIWYG editor (e.g., tiptap) for article writing.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes (kebab-case, role-based).
Use the specific fonts: Outfit (Headings), IBM Plex Sans (Body), JetBrains Mono (Data/Tags). Add their Google Fonts import to the global CSS.
